name: Higgstec Inc.
summary: Higgstec Inc. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, sale, and service of various touch solutions. The company offers standard and custom 5-wire resistive, and projected capacitive touch solutions, as well as PCAP touch controllers, and 5-wire resistive touch controllers and panels. Its products and solutions are used in various fields, including aviation, marine, education, medical, military, gaming arcade, IPC, vehicle, POS, ATM, cash register, house appliances, office automation, smart home appliances, security monitoring systems, etc. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
